title: narcissus poeticus var. stellaris
intro: Narcissus poeticus var. stellaris, also known as the Poet's Narcissus or Stellar Narcissus, is a perennial bulbous plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. It contains the alkaloid galantamine, which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including treating memory loss and neurological disorders. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to improve cognitive function, reduce anxiety and depression, and act as an antispasmodic agent. In herbal preparations, the bulbs of Narcissus poeticus var. stellaris are often used to make extracts, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
